---
title: "features"
format: html
---

## Feature categories

<!--JC still needs to update his script to separate locs_emotion feats and combine locs_risk-->

<!--combining recs for efficacy motivation recent and week-->


1.  Locations with alcohol

2.  Locations to avoid

3.  Locations with past drinking

4.  Locations with mixed emotions (still currently mixed with next two loc emotion feats)

    -   RP 18 (emotional triggers)

5.  Locations with pleasant emotions (not going to pleasant is risk)

6.  Locations with unpleasant emotions (NOTgoing to unpleasant is risk)

7.  Locations that are risky

8.  AA (protective)

9.  Friends (protective)

    -   rp26 (repairing relationships)

10. Healthcare (protective)

    -   matrix rp17 (taking care of yourself)
    -   rp19 (illness)

11. Time at home (protective)

12. Restaurants

13. Time at work

    -   alcohol scripts ("it helps me relax")
    -   work stressors as triggers

14. Future efficacy/motivation

15. Abstinence goal

16. Craving

17. Past risky situations

18. Future risky situations

19. Past stressors or hassles

    -   rp20 (recognizing stress)

20. Future stressors or hassles

    -   rp22 (reducing stress)

21. Highly pleasant events (risk factor)


22. Average pleasant events (protective)


23. Past use

24. Activated negative affect (angry)

    -   rp 23 (managing anger)

25. Deactivated negative affect (depressed)

    -   cbt depression module

26. Evenings out

27. Day of week

28. Location variance (risk)
